sources.title: Spaghetti A Mezzanotte 1988
sources.description: Savino (Lino Banfi) discovers his wife Celeste (Barbara Bouchet) is fooling around. Of course, Lino is having an affair with Elvira (Alida Chelli) so I am not sure how much room he has to complain.  Another slapstick Italian comedy with an unattractive male and lots of attractive women.  Italian with optional English subtitles

metadata.Plot: Savino La Gastra discovers his wife Celeste has a liaison with an architect: Andrea. Even if also Savino has a story with Elvira, a judge's wife, he decides anyway to ask to a mobster to kill his wife. In the mean time Celeste is organizing a surprise party for Savino's birthday, and that day things start to get complicated. First Savino kills accidentally the mafia killer in charge to kill Celeste; second his lover Elvira arrives to the party with the judge... not to mention the police and the mafia Don...
metadata.Writer: Franco Marotta, Sergio Martino, Laura Toscano
metadata.Actors: Barbara Bouchet, Lino Banfi, Alida Chelli
